seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Captains Mountain and Caravonica. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Captains Mountain vs Caravonica: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Captains Mountain and Caravonica.
heading: Captains Mountain vs Caravonica — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Captains Mountain, Queensland and Caravonica, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caravonica has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Captains Mountain (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Captains Mountain or Caravonica safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Captains Mountain has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Caravonica scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Captains Mountain scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Caravonica scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Captains Mountain or Caravonica?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caravonica has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
